intro:
There is not much information about the plant Thamnopteris nidus, however I was able to find some information.

Thamnopteris nidus is a species of fern, a type of vascular plant that reproduces via spores, typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. The health benefits of Thamnopteris nidus include its potential anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Thamnopteris nidus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
